component.name: Apex Infinite Hyperterminal
component.summary: Operator console for autonomous Apex Spec Codex workflows

description.p: Apex Infinite Hyperterminal is the optional Linux visual surface for the apex-infinite workflow runner. It renders registered workflow events as a dense, reactive command center: run controls, mission state, spec progress, provider health, and a typed event core with filters and export.
The base CLI stays terminal-only; the Hyperterminal consumes the machine-readable JSONL event stream and never scrapes terminal output.
First Hyperterminal release: component command surface, visual profiles, quality tiers, event-reactive effects, doctor, and desktop integration.
